title: More Nonsense Limerick 61
content:
There was an old person of Sark,
    Who made an unpleasant remark;
    But they said, "Don't you see 
    What a brute you must be,
    You obnoxious old person of Sark!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 61"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
